data.title: Mosaic's plan for Chapter 11 reorganization in Texas approved, allows recapitalization of loan servicing by Solar Servicing LLC.
data.description: An Oakland-based fintech platform, Solar Mosaic, focusing on U.S. residential solar and energy-efficient home improvements, shared news of approval from the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas regarding their Chapter 11 Plan of Reorganization. This Plan enables the recapitalization of the loan servicing operation via an entity named Solar Servicing LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary. This development signifies a significant step in restructuring and financial revitalization following legal proceedings.
U.S. effective federal funds rate remained steady at 4.33% on September 4, with $118 billion in trades, unchanged from $119 billion on September 3, according to Federal Reserve data.
World Health Organization Includes Ozempic and Mounjaro in Essential Medicines List

data.title: August's jobs report shows only 22,000 jobs added, down from expected 75,000. Market expects Fed to cut rates.
data.description: The American labor market has hit a significant slowdown, with the August jobs report indicating a notable decrease in hiring. This has sparked expectations that the Federal Reserve will have to make interest rate cuts, potentially more aggressively than initially predicted by the markets. The data revealed that only 22,000 jobs were added to the U.S. economy in August, a sharp decline from the 79,000 jobs added in July and well below the 75,000 jobs forecasted by economists. Furthermore, revisions to previous months added to the negative outlook, with June's payrolls reduced by 27,000 indicating a loss of 13,000 jobs, while July was adjusted upwards by 6,000 to 79,000 jobs. Overall, the employment situation for June and July has raised concerns...

data.title: Sandbox VR to open its 3rd location in Osnabrück on Sept 11 at Rheiner Landstraße 5, 49205 Hasbergen. Owned by Royal Casinos DGS GMBH.
data.description: Sandbox VR, a leading virtual reality entertainment provider, in partnership with Royal Casinos DGS GMBH, is excited to unveil its inaugural location in Osnabrück, Germany. This groundbreaking venue is set to open its doors on Thursday, September 11, at Rheiner Landstraße 5, 49205 Hasbergen. Notably, Sandbox VR Osnabrück marks the third establishment operated by Royal Casinos DGS GMBH, with the previous locations being Sandbox VR Hamburg and Sandbox VR Berlin, debuting in 2024 and March 2025, respectively.

data.title: Quebec City Resale Market strong in Aug with 643 transactions. Plex sales jump 61%, single-family homes up 6%. Condo sales drop 14%. Shortage of properties intensifies, with 1,743 on market, down 23% from last year. Median single-family home price rises 18% to $461,500. Market conditions favor sellers greatly.
data.description: Sales in the Quebec City CMA saw a 4% increase in August with 643 transactions, marking the second-highest number of sales for August since the pandemic peak. The Northern Periphery had the largest increase at 19%. Plexes had a remarkable 61% jump in sales, while single-family homes saw a 6% increase. Condominium sales, however, dropped by 14%, the first significant decline in this category since May 2023. The shortage of properties for sale continued, with a 23% decrease from August 2024, resulting in 1,743 properties on the market. Sellers benefitted from historical market conditions, leading to overheating, overbidding, and a 25-day reduction in property selling time. Median prices for single-family homes rose by 18% to $461,500, marking a 9th consecutive month of 15%+ growth. Condominium and plex median prices rose by 13%. This data reveals the intense market activity and challenges in Quebec City's real estate sector.
